config.handytrader.title: Handy Trader Settings
config.handytrader.enableFavorites.desc: Allow marking and highlighting favorite trades on villagers.
config.handytrader.enableBulkTrade.desc: Shift-click a favorited trade to repeat it until you run out of items or the villager locks the trade.
config.handytrader.bulkTradeAllTrades.de: Allow Shift-click bulk-trading on any trade, not just favorited ones. Off by default so it stays out of the way of mods like Villager Trading Plus.
config.handytrader.bulkTradeMax.desc: Maximum number of trades a single Shift-click performs (safety cap). The trade's own stock usually stops it sooner.
tooltip.handytrader.bulkHint: Shift-click the trade to trade all
